Legal information

Privacy Policy

This page explains what data may be handled through normal site usage.

Analytics

The site may use analytics tools to understand visits, pages viewed, and general content performance.

Contact

If you contact the site by email, the information you send is used only for that communication.

No user accounts

The current site does not provide public user accounts, subscriptions, or checkout forms.

Cookies, analytics, and advertising partners

The site may use cookies, analytics scripts, hosting logs, and advertising technologies to understand traffic, measure page performance, prevent abuse, and support free public content. Advertising partners may process browser or device signals according to their own privacy policies and consent tools.

Email and voluntary information

If a visitor sends an email, the message may include an email address, page URL, correction notes, and any details the visitor chooses to provide. That information is used to respond, review the issue, improve the site, or keep a basic record of business communication.

Future paid features

If checkout, digital reports, subscriptions, or user accounts are added later, this policy should be reviewed and updated before those features go live. Payment secrets, API keys, and private credentials must not be stored in public frontend code.

Visitor choices and retention

Visitors can limit cookies through browser settings and can choose not to send email or voluntary information. Basic hosting, security, and analytics logs may be retained for a reasonable period to diagnose errors, measure content performance, and protect the site from abuse. The site does not build public user profiles in its current form.

Chinese Knot Guide

This site explains Chinese knot tutorials, meanings, craft supplies, and gift use cases for educational and DIY reference.
